Description: MCU Cortex-M0+ 64MHz 128KB Flash 36KB SRAM USB DFU
RS-485 transceiver pair for full-duplex (RX path + TX heartbeat path)
Buck power inductor for U4 SW node
Hex Schmitt-trigger inverter (2 pcs for 8 override channels, logic inverted in firmware)
Asymmetric TVS diode (one per RS-485 pair)
USB-C D+/D-/VBUS ESD protection array (place at J7)
PCB-mount ATO blade fuse holder, 22.5A cont/30A max 32V (12V input trunk). Accepts 25A ATO blade fuse (field-inserted accessory, not PCBA). THT - may need hand-solder.
10k resistors (gate pull-down, override pull-up/RC, BOOT0 pull-down)
Decoupling and override RC caps (MCU/RS-485/Schmitt/12V + 8x override RC + VIN HF bypass)
VDDA decoupling (C15) + per-IC 1uF VCC bypass in parallel with 100nF: C31=U2A, C32=U2B (RS-485), C33=U5, C34=U6 (Schmitt)
Buck 3V3 output bulk caps, 2x 22uF per AP63203 datasheet (SMD tantalum)

Screw terminals: 12V board input (J1: VIN_12V_IN + GND) and load +12V feed (J6: both poles 12V_MAIN, paralleled). 24A/450V, 12-22AWG - each carries full 16A trunk. Load ground return is internal (MOSFET sources to GND, back to PSU via J1.2). Use >=14AWG (12AWG preferred) wiring.
